title: A massive model drop: Claude Opus 4.8, Perplexity Sonar, and StepFun
summary:
A massive model expansion including Claude Opus 4.8 and Perplexity Sonar, a new real-time voice API, and rolling retention for popular generated content.

We wired up a heavy lineup of new models. Claude Opus 4.8 brings a 1M context window and prompt caching. The Perplexity Sonar suite (`perplexity`, `perplexity-deep`) is now available with dynamic web search context sizing. We also added StepFun's Step 3.5 and 3.7 Flash models for multimodal reasoning and tool use.

Added a `/v1/realtime` endpoint to the generation API. It provides an OpenAI-compatible WebSocket connection for low-latency voice and multimodal sessions using `gpt-realtime-2`. Just point your standard OpenAI realtime SDK at Pollinations and it works.

Generated media, images, and text backed by R2 storage previously expired after a hard 30 days. We implemented a rolling TTL: if an object is accessed after 15 days, its 30-day lifecycle resets. If people keep requesting it, we keep hosting it.
